page_content:
Formerly: CPSP227.

CPSS230 College Park Scholars: Science, Technology & Society - Internship Practicum (1 Credit)

Supervised internship in an area related to science, technology and society.

Prerequisite: CPSS101.

Restriction: Matriculation into the College Park Scholars Science, Technology & Society (CPSS) program.

CPSS240 College Park Scholars: Science, Technology & Society - Service-Learning Practicum (3 Credits)

Supervised Service-Learning practicum in issues related to science, technology and society.

Restriction: Matriculation into the College Park Scholars Science, Technology & Society (CPSS) program; or permission of instructor.
